executiveSummary: The ADE - In Day Sales semantic model has a health score of 0/100 (Grade F). It contains 30 tables (1 DirectQuery, 0 Dual), 283 measures, and 20 relationships (0 bidirectional). BPA detected 559 findings (22 high, 34 medium). DAX analysis found 11 FILTER(ALL) anti-patterns and 11 measures generating 5+ SQL subqueries.

topFindings.title: 11 FILTER(ALL) Anti-Patterns
topFindings.description: 11 DAX measures use FILTER(ALL()) which forces full table scans in DirectQuery. Combined with large fact tables, each generates an unfiltered subquery.
topFindings.recommendation: Refactor to REMOVEFILTERS() or direct CALCULATE predicates. Prioritise measures on high-traffic pages.
suggestedAnalysisSteps: Run top 10 FILTER(ALL) measures in DAX Studio with Server Timings
Compare SE vs FE time split
tradeoffs: Requires thorough testing for calculation equivalence

topFindings.title: 11 Measures Generating 5+ SQL Subqueries
topFindings.description: 11 measures have high context transition counts generating 5+ SQL subqueries each in DirectQuery mode.
topFindings.recommendation: Refactor using VAR, consolidate nested CALCULATE, reduce context transitions.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: 20-50% query time reduction for visuals using these measures.
tradeoffs: Complex business logic may limit simplification

topFindings.title: 2 Wide Tables (>50 columns)
topFindings.description: 2 tables have >50 columns. In DirectQuery, all columns are included in generated SQL.
topFindings.recommendation: Audit unused columns and remove from model. Consider narrow serve views.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: Proportional reduction in read_bytes per query.
tradeoffs: Column removal requires coordination with report authors

topFindings.title: 415 Unused Column Candidates
topFindings.description: 415 columns not referenced in any DAX measure. Candidates for removal to reduce DQ payload.
topFindings.recommendation: Audit columns, verify not used in visuals/slicers, remove confirmed unused.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: Cost reduction — fewer bytes read per query.
tradeoffs: Some may be used in visuals or bookmarks

topFindings.title: 10 Pass-Through Serve Views (>50 cols, no filter)
topFindings.description: 10 dbt serve views are SELECT * pass-throughs with >50 columns and no WHERE filter.
topFindings.recommendation: Create narrow serve views selecting only columns used by PBI measures.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: 60-70% reduction in read_bytes for affected tables.
tradeoffs: Must audit PBI column usage before narrowing

actions.action: 10 Pass-Through Serve Views (>50 cols, no filter)
